document_references.description: Annual wellness exam for 36-year-old female. Documents chief complaint, ROS, vitals, physical exam (lungs clear, cardiovascular normal, abdomen benign), PHQ-2 depression screen (negative), asthma assessment (ACT 23, well controlled), preventive care review (influenza vaccine current, Pap smear not yet due), medication reconciliation (albuterol refill), lab orders (CBC, CMP, lipid panel, HbA1c), and social note regarding food affordability concern declined for intervention. Plan includes continued asthma management, labs pending review, and follow-up in one year.
